sections.title: Driving R&D breakthroughs to push humanity forward.
Use-inspired research across four frontiers
sections.body: We work in Pasteur's Quadrant — pursuing fundamental understanding while staying anchored to real-world impact. Our four focus areas span the most consequential frontiers in computing, society, and human cognition.

sections.title: Digital Human Rights
sections.subtitle: Building open, verifiable, censorship-resistant infrastructure human freedom & agency in the digital age.

sections.title: Economies & Governance
sections.subtitle: Building programmable infrastructure for more efficient, equitable coordination at global scale.

sections.title: AI & Robotics
sections.subtitle: Building open compute, coordination, data, and economic rails for autonomous agents and embodied AI.

sections.title: Neurotechnology
sections.subtitle: Accelerating brain-computer interfaces (BCI), whole-brain emulation (WBE), & NeuroAI to expand human cognition.

sections.body: A fully remote team distributed across the globe, working with talented and intellectually curious people who share a passion for improving technology for humanity.
